title_zh: 投放前先做关键词研究: keywords 必须拆到 ad group 维度
summary_zh: Aaron 强调跑 Google Ads 前必须先完成 keyword research, 而且要把关键词拆到不同 campaign 和 ad group 里。原理: 一个 ad group 只放一个 keyword theme, 这样后续优化、预算分配、报表都能基于明确维度做决策, 而不是混在一起一团乱。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 同样要按 keyword theme 分组而不是把 broad/phrase/exact 混在一个 campaign。
quote_en: before you even dive in and set up and start your google ads campaign you need to do your keyword research first and so much so that you need to have all of your keywords broken into different campaigns and ad groups

title_zh: 关键词研究先用 Google Doc 手写真实搜索词, 再进 Keyword Planner
summary_zh: Aaron 不直接打开 Keyword Planner, 而是先在 Google Doc 里手写自己作为消费者会搜的词 (e.g. pest control + 地区修饰词), 把这批种子词复制粘贴进 Keyword Planner discover new keywords 里。原理: 真实消费者搜索习惯比第三方算法更接近实际意图, 起手用真人语料能避免被工具误导扩到无关词。Amazon 启示: 做 SP keyword 调研时, listing copy 不该是唯一种子, 自己以买家身份搜一遍补全 long-tail。
quote_en: the way that I actually start this process and the way that I've always found I've had the most success in google ads campaigns is when I've actually completed before I've even gone into google ads and used the google search keyword tool

title_zh: 选词只看 trend 不看绝对值, 高竞争 + 高 CPC 直接砍
summary_zh: Keyword Planner 给的 monthly search / competition / top of page bid 都只反映过去趋势, 不是未来确定值。Aaron 决策方法: 高 search volume + low/medium competition + 可承受 CPC 的留下; 像 pest control 这种泛词竞争和单价都极高就主动放弃, 用 pest control + 地区 这种 mid-tail 词更划算。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 选词同理, head term 像 'water bottle' 卷不过大牌, 加品类/材质修饰的 long-tail ACoS 更友好。
quote_en: we look here some of these more targeted keywords like pest control sunshine coast and brisbane we've got some really good search volumes but the the the clicks are a little bit more a little bit cheaper as well

title_zh: One Keyword Theme 拆分: 同一类目按地区/属性独立 campaign
summary_zh: Aaron 把 keyword 导出成 csv 后, 加两列 (campaign / ad group), 把 'pest control brisbane' 和 'pest control gold coast' 拆到独立 campaign。原理: 不同地区可独立设预算; 报表能立刻看出哪个区域好哪个区域差; 写 ad copy 时 headline 可直接写 'pest control brisbane' 而不是泛词, 提高 CTR。Amazon 启示: 不同 ASIN/品类/受众应拆 campaign 而不是塞一个 campaign 多 ad group, 才能独立调预算和单价。
quote_en: by breaking it down and only having one keyword theme one single keyword theme in each of your ad groups it means that when you come to actually write your ad copy you you can become really really specific and really really targeted

title_zh: Keyword Theme 越细越好, 一个 ad group 只放一个主题
summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调 one keyword theme method: 单个 ad group 内只放一个关键词主题。好处四点: ad copy 可写得更精准提升 quality score; 能看清哪个 theme 出转化; 表现差的 theme 一键暂停而不会牵连其他词; 报表清晰。原理: ad group 是 Google Ads 的最小优化单元, 只有保持单一性才能做出基于数据的决策。Amazon 启示: SP keyword campaign 不要把 head + long-tail 混在一个 ad group, 拆开能精确停掉烧钱的词。
quote_en: for this method we only put one keyword theme into each ad group and this is very important for a number of reasons including that it makes it easier to write keyword focused ad copy for high quality keyword scores it allows you to very easily see which keyword themes are more successful in generating conversions

title_zh: Keyword Theme 拆得细 → ad copy 和 landing page 才能强相关
summary_zh: Aaron 用 Bali villa 案例: 把关键词拆成 'one bedroom villas bali / one bedroom villas seminyak / 2 bedroom villas / general bali' 等子主题, 每个 ad group 配独立 ad copy 和 landing page。原理: 搜 seminyak 的人看到 seminyak 文案 + 直接落到 seminyak 房型页, 转化路径最短; 用 generic 文案 CTR 和转化率都会掉。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 不能用一套创意打所有 ASIN, 不同卖点匹配不同搜索意图才能压低 ACoS。
quote_en: the benefit of this structure is that it means you can target your individual keyword themes with specific ad copy and also specific landing pages on your website

title_zh: Keyword Planner 数据只看 trend, 别死磕精确值
summary_zh: Aaron 提醒做 keyword research 时数据是动态的: 你研究完竞品大牌一进场, 所有 CPC/竞争度估算瞬间变。所以只看 trend 不看绝对数: 哪些词流量大、竞争重、CPC 走势如何。原理: 实时拍卖市场没有静态答案, 选词逻辑应基于相对优劣而不是某个具体 CPC 数字。Amazon 启示: SP 调研某词 'suggested bid 1.5 USD' 不可作为长期决策依据, 上线后要持续根据实际 ACoS 微调。
quote_en: don't get caught up on exact figures as you need to remember that all of the data that you're seeing is just reporting on past data trends and that this data can actually change by the time you press go on your campaign

title_zh: 选词三筛标准: 相关性 + 竞争度 + CPC 三关一起看
summary_zh: 在 Keyword Planner 里选词时 Aaron 三步过滤: (1) 相关性 e.g. 'free business cards' 对收费业务无意义直接砍; (2) 竞争度 high 单看不够; (3) competition high + top-of-page bid 双高的词砍掉, 否则烧不起。原理: 单一指标会误导, 三关同时通过的才进 plan。Amazon 启示: SP 选词同样要 ASIN 相关性 + suggested bid + impression share 三看, 高竞争词不一定要全部铺开。
quote_en: we are looking at is not only is this competition too high but if the competition is high and then also the top of page bid is too high we can leave that out of our campaign

title_zh: 导出 csv 后再次细拆主题: 一组拆成 4-5 个 ad group
summary_zh: Aaron 把 Keyword Planner 选好的 'signage' 一类导出 csv 后, 再用人工眼力拆成 'business signage / custom signs / outdoor signage / sign company near me' 等 4 个 ad group。原 'signage near me' 太宽直接删掉。原理: 工具导出的初步分组依然不够细, 必须人工二次拆分到极简主题, 每个 ad group 才能配高度匹配的 ad copy。Amazon 启示: SP 自动跑出来的 search term 报表也要人工二次拆主题再迁回 manual 精准词。
quote_en: now I'm actually now deciding that this keyword is actually too broad so I'm going to remove that keyword and just work on these four main keyword themes of business signage custom signs outdoor signage and sign company near me

title_zh: Match Type 已不再需要分 ad group, 只放一种类型即可
summary_zh: Google 2021 调整: broader match 现在自动包含 narrower match (broad 含 phrase 含 exact)。所以以前流行的 '同一关键词三种 match type 各开一个 ad group' 做法已经过时, 现在每个词只放一种 match type 就行。原理: Google 的撮合逻辑变了, 重复布词只会浪费预算和分散数据。Amazon 启示: SP 也存在 match type, 同一关键词的 broad / phrase / exact 不要堆在同一个 ad group, 选清楚目标后只用一种。
quote_en: broader match types capture all queries of narrower match types so what this actually means is if you're targeting a phrase match keyword google will now automatically also match any exact match keywords

title_zh: Exact Match 已变 'same meaning', 必须每周做 search term audit
summary_zh: Google 把 exact match 升级成语义匹配: 'lawn mowing service' 会触发 'grass cutting service'; 案例里 'all blacks headphones' 居然触发 'all blacks rugby jacket'。所以现在每 7 天必须查 search term 报告, 把无关词加成 negative keyword。原理: 语义匹配会引入 Google 自以为相关但实际无关的流量, 不主动屏蔽就持续烧预算。Amazon 启示: SP 同样要每周拉 search term 报表把无关 customer search 加进 negative keyword/ASIN, 这是 Amazon 投放最高 ROI 的优化动作之一。
quote_en: if you've got a highly specific product and a highly specific target market where you want to only be targeting search terms such as all blacks headphones what you need to do is you actually need to go through and do a search term audit every seven days

title_zh: Headlines 蓝色更醒目, ad copy 重点全压在 headline
summary_zh: Google 搜索结果里 headline 是蓝色加粗, description 是普通灰色文字。用户扫页面 headline 不抓眼球, description 根本不会被读, 更别提点击。所以写 ad copy 80% 精力放 headline (3 条 ×30 字符), description 配合即可。原理: 用户决策链路只有 1 秒不到, 视觉权重不平等。Amazon 启示: SB headline 也是同理, listing title 前 80 字符决定 CTR, 后面写得再细也没人看。
quote_en: your headlines are bold and blue so they stand out more than the descriptions so if your headlines do not grab their attention they won't even read your descriptions let alone click on your ad

title_zh: Headline 必须含 4 要素: keyword + brand + CTA + emotion
summary_zh: Aaron 经过多次 split test 沉淀的 headline 公式: (1) keyword focus (e.g. 'one bedroom seminyak villa'); (2) brand mention (花了广告费别浪费曝光机会); (3) strong CTA (call now / book now / save 45%); (4) emotional trigger (curiosity / humor / fear)。原理: keyword 是 Google quality score 喜欢的, 后三项是 user 喜欢的, 两边都满足才能做出高 CTR + 高 CVR 的 ad。Amazon 启示: SB/SD 创意文案也是这个逻辑, 单纯堆 keyword 太机械, 加品牌名 + 促销 hook 才会被点。
quote_en: the four things you need in your headlines is firstly you need to have keyword focus... the second thing is a brand mention... the other one is a strong call to action... and the last one is use emotional triggers

title_zh: Title Case 大写每个单词首字母, 提升 CTR 实测有效
summary_zh: ad copy 把每个单词首字母大写 (e.g. 'Book Your Appointment Now') 而不是 sentence case ('Book your appointment now')。WordStream 和 Periscopic 实测 title case 比 sentence case CTR 更高, 不违反 AdWords 政策。原理: 视觉上更突出, 在一堆小写竞品广告里更醒目。Amazon 启示: SB headline / brand store 标题用 title case 是免费的 CTR 优化, 几乎零成本可执行。
quote_en: two companies wordstream and periscopic have conducted studies into the effects of using title case on the click-through ratio ctr and found that ad copy with title case outperform sentence case

title_zh: Emotion + 反常 hook 比 discount 更出圈, skinny dip 案例
summary_zh: Aaron 的 Bali 别墅广告用 'skinny dip in your own pool' 当 headline, 因为别墅有 3 米高围墙带私人泳池。结果有客人专门来邮件确认 '我真的能裸泳吗？', 转化效果远超普通 discount 广告。原理: 行业里都在喊降价, 你用反差感 hook 创造心理画面 (curiosity), 让用户主动想象使用场景。Amazon 启示: 创意视频/A+ 不要全部都是 USP 罗列, 选一个反常使用场景 (e.g. 凉鞋穿去爬山) 反而记忆点更深。
quote_en: this has been the absolute knockout home run for us is that in our ad copy we were able to create some curiosity and humor by saying that you can skinny dip in your own pool

title_zh: ad copy 双重达标: Google 喜欢 + User 喜欢
summary_zh: Aaron 把 ad copy 评判拆成两个维度: Google likes (keyword focus 进 quality score, 影响排位) + User likes (CTA + emotional trigger, 影响 CTR)。两个都过关才有高 ROAS。常见失败案例是 ad copy 太机械, 只堆 keyword 通过审核, 但用户根本不点。原理: 算法和人是两个客户, 都得伺候好。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 创意要既包含买家搜索词 (relevance score), 又有点击欲望钩子 (折扣 / 痛点)。
quote_en: you don't only need to focus on what google likes because you also need to focus on what the user likes... most ads fail down is that they're too robotic and there's no point getting an ad that gets shown all the time if people actually don't click on it

title_zh: 用 'Guaranteed Best Price' 化解第三方比价的恐惧情绪
summary_zh: 酒店行业用户被 Booking.com 等比价站训练成永远在比价, Aaron 在自己的直营广告 headline 加 'Guaranteed Best Price' 直接消解这种 fear。原理: 用户犹豫的根因往往是怕买贵 / 怕买错, 写一句保证语句直接砸掉这个犹豫点, 转化率明显提升。Amazon 启示: listing 卡片 / SB 创意可以用 'Lowest Price On Amazon' / '30-Day Money Back' 这类反 fear 文案, 比单纯说卖点更打动人。
quote_en: we were able to actually pull on that fear emotion with this last headline of guaranteed best price and what this actually did is it actually removed the fear with a guarantee

title_zh: RSA pinning: 把验证过的 headline 钉在固定位置
summary_zh: RSA 默认让 Google AI 随机组合 15 个 headline 和 4 个 description, 但单 ad group 没 5000 月曝光时 AI 永远学不完。Aaron 的解法: 用 pin 功能把已验证的高转化 headline 钉到 position 1/2/3, 让 RSA 表现得像 ETA。原理: 在数据不够喂 AI 时, 人工经验 > AI 探索。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 没有 pin 但有创意权重控制, 高 ROAS 的素材应该手动加预算固定跑, 不要全交给系统优化。
quote_en: even though you have the ability of adding up to 15 different headlines and up to four different descriptions you can still create an ad where you're only adding three headlines and then google also gives you the option to pin those headlines in either position one two or three

title_zh: RSA split test 双 ad 法: 一个全开 + 一个 pin 固定
summary_zh: Aaron 推荐 RSA split test 路径: 在同 ad group 里建两个 RSA, 一个完全不 pin (让 Google 自由组合), 另一个 pin 死特定 headline/description。对比两者的 CTR/CVR, 找出真正赢家后, 把 winner 元素回填到第一个 ad。原理: 同时利用 AI 探索 + 人工固化, 数据闭环可控。Amazon 启示: SP 创意 split test 也是这逻辑, 同 ad group 跑 2-3 个素材竞争, 表现最好的留下并扩增预算。
quote_en: the second option to complete split testing with the response of search ads would be to have one responsive search ad which has no pinned headlines and no pin descriptions and then you would have a secondary response to search ad which would have some pinned headlines and pin descriptions

title_zh: Google AI 学习需 5000 月曝光, 中小账号根本喂不饱
summary_zh: RSA learning phase 需要 5000 impressions / 30 天才能给出 performance 评级。中小广告主单 ad group 远达不到, 所以 RSA 永远卡在学习状态, AI 给不出靠谱组合, CPC/CPA 失控。Aaron 实测案例: 某 RSA cost-per-conversion 181 USD vs ETA 50 USD。原理: AI 缺数据 = 瞎决策。Amazon 启示: SP 自动定向同样需要数据冷启动, 中小预算账号别全押 auto, 应该 manual 锁定已验证的关键词。
quote_en: in order for google to finish its learning phase so that it's ai can actually know which headlines and descriptions to show it actually needs 5,000 impressions in a 30-day period the problem for most small and medium businesses is that individual ad groups get nowhere near 5000 impressions

title_zh: Pin 操作把 RSA cost/conversion 从 181 砍到 39
summary_zh: Aaron 案例: 一个 RSA 原本 cost/conv 181 USD, 他用之前 ETA 时代沉淀的 winner CTA ('from just 39/month' + 'month-to-month contracts') 通过 pin 钉死位置, 结果 cost/conv 降到 39 USD。原理: 把历史验证过的高转化文案锁住位置, 等于把 ETA 的稳定性叠加到 RSA 的形式上, 拿两边好处。Amazon 启示: 不要因为新形式就丢掉旧 winner 文案, 历史 ROAS 高的卖点该用还得用。
quote_en: we made a really simple change and we started actually pinning in some of our headlines and also some of our descriptions... since we've made those changes we've been able to see the cost per conversion for this responsive search ad reduced from 181 dollars all the way down to 39

title_zh: Google 目标: 把单一 search query 匹配到唯一 landing page
summary_zh: Aaron 解释 Google 的核心目标: 在 500 亿网页里把用户搜索匹配到最佳页面。所以你的账号结构应该镜像这个目标: account → campaign → ad group (单 keyword theme) → 独立 ad copy + 独立 landing page。原理: 你的结构越贴合 Google 的撮合逻辑, quality score 越高, CPC 越低。Amazon 启示: SP 的 ad group 也要按 ASIN 关联词分组, 让搜索 → 创意 → 落地 ASIN 形成 1:1 映射。
quote_en: google wants to match what the person searches with the best web page on the internet... so to give your google ads campaign the best chance for success making sure that your ads are matching those individual search enquiries your campaign structure needs to look like this

title_zh: Optimization 必须有 schedule, 不同动作不同频率
summary_zh: Aaron 把 Google Ads 优化类比健身: 健身教练不会让你天天 bench press, 同样优化也不能每天瞎调。他的节奏: search term audit / keyword 每周 1-2 次; audience 和 bid optimization 每 45-60 天才动一次。原理: 不同维度需要不同样本积累周期, 高频盯短期数据反而会被噪声误导。Amazon 启示: SP 调价不要每天调, 每周看趋势再动手, ASIN target / audience 这种长周期动作 30-45 天看一次足够。
quote_en: you need to know what you need to optimize in google every 72 hours every week every month every 90 days and even every year... for some items like search term audits and checking your keywords they need to be checked and optimized once or twice every week versus when you're checking your audiences and your bid optimizations you don't need to check those until every sort of 45 or 60 days

title_zh: Audiences in observation mode + bid adjustment 把 ROAS 从 1.5 拉到 8
summary_zh: Aaron 接手一个 Shopping campaign, 14 天内把 ROAS 从 1.5 提到 8 的关键动作: 在 ad group 加 audiences 但用 observation mode (不是 targeting), 这样不会限缩流量, 只是给 Google 多一个数据维度报表; 14 天后看哪些 audience 转化好, 用正向 bid adjustment 加价。原理: observation 模式下 audience 只是观察口, 不会过早收窄流量, 等数据足够再用 bid 加权才不浪费学习期。Amazon 启示: SD/SP 的 audience targeting 也建议先广撒后用 bid 加权, 不要一上来就排他锁定。
quote_en: we added these audiences to the campaign as observations and not actually as targeting... what this allowed us to do is to actually understand which one of these audiences was converting really well and then to be able to put a positive bid adjustment on those audiences

title_zh: 受众别只锁 niche, 出乎意料的 audience 反而是赢家
summary_zh: Aaron 在某美发产品 Shopping campaign 里加了一堆 audience, 结果转化最好的不是 'hair care enthusiasts' 这类 niche audience, 而是 'luxury shoppers' 和 'family film fans' 这类看起来无关的兴趣群。原理: 用户的实际购买路径常常和品牌假设的不一样, 只锁 niche 会漏掉真实买家画像。Amazon 启示: SD audience targeting 不要只选 'in-market for X' 这种最直接的细分, 应该铺一些跨品类兴趣 audience 用 observation 模式跑数据。
quote_en: we don't only just want to add audiences within your niche because you just don't know how some of those other audiences are going to perform... we found that some of the more successful audiences were actually luxury shoppers and family film fans

title_zh: Audience 报表里 'Other' 占比高 = 你漏加了关键 audience
summary_zh: Aaron 检查 audience 报告必看一行: 'Other'。这一行代表流量来自你没添加的 audience segment。如果 Other 占比超过 10%, 说明你的 audience 覆盖不足, 需要继续添加新 audience 直到 Other 降到 10% 以下、自定义 audience 覆盖率 90%+ 才能做精准 bid 优化。原理: 没数据维度就没法决策, Other 是 Google 在告诉你 '你看不到的部分还很大'。Amazon 启示: SD audience 报表如果有大量未归类流量, 也要主动扩 audience 池来获取可优化粒度。
quote_en: the first thing you need to do is to look at this 'other' row... what that means is that there are people who are visiting your website and clicking on your ads who don't fit into any of the audiences that you've added... we want to be aiming for at least over 90 percent of all of our website traffic from our google ads to fit into one of these audiences

title_zh: Audience bid 调整决策: cost/conv vs 账号均值 + impression share 双重判断
summary_zh: Aaron 决定给某 audience 加 bid 的两道闸门: (1) 该 audience 的 cost/conversion 是否低于账号整体均值 (好于均值才值得加价); (2) search impression share 是否还有上升空间 (已经 100% 就没必要加价烧钱)。两条都满足才上调 bid 10-20%。原理: 单看转化好不够, 必须同时确认还有流量可以拿, 否则只是空烧 CPC。Amazon 启示: SP keyword 调价同理, 高 ROAS + impression share 还低的词才值得加价, 已经 top of search 100% 的不用动。
quote_en: we want to look at our search impression share to see if there's any further opportunity to grow the impressions we're getting from this audience as well... if we're already at 100 percent search impression share with this audience there's no point of putting on a positive bid adjustment because we're not going to get any more impressions

title_zh: 投放前先把 detailed demographics 和 audience 加上, 喂算法快速冷启动
summary_zh: Aaron 强调一个反直觉做法: 不要等开始投放后再加 audience 和 detailed demographics, 而是 launch 前就在 ad group 里把这些都加上 observation 模式。婴儿奶粉案例: 提前加 'parents of infants/toddlers/preschoolers' demographics, 让 Google 算法第一天就能知道往哪些群体去优化。原理: 算法冷启动期是最缺数据的, 提前给画像信号能加速 learning phase。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 创建时就要把品类相关的 lifestyle / in-market audience 都铺上 observation, 不要等跑了几周再补。
quote_en: what most google advertisers don't do but they should be doing is they should be adding their detailed demographics and audiences to their ad groups before they actually start running their campaigns... if you're selling baby formula you would want to add things such as detailed demographic of parents with infants

title_zh: 提升 CTR 直接压低 CPC: Google 只在被点击时赚钱
summary_zh: Aaron 揭穿底层逻辑: Google 只有用户点击 ad 才能赚到钱, 所以高 CTR 的广告对 Google 更值钱, 系统会用更低 CPC 优先展示。反之 CTR 低的广告 Google 会要求更高 CPC 来弥补。所以盯紧 CTR 优化 (改 headline / 加 CTA / 测 emotional hook) 等于在直接降 CPC。原理: 拍卖系统的 quality score 里 expected CTR 是核心权重之一。Amazon 启示: SP/SB 的 CPC 也跟 CTR 挂钩, 提升点击率不光是省广告费, 还能直接拿到更便宜的位置。
quote_en: the higher the click-through rate of your ad the lower the cost per click is going to be for that ad and the reason for that is google only gets paid when someone actually clicks on the ad so they want to show ads which actually generate clicks

title_zh: 高单价/复杂表单类目按 device 加价, 电脑端往往比手机更值钱
summary_zh: Aaron 跑过的复杂表单 / 高客单价产品 (e.g. 保险、B2B) 在电脑端转化率明显高于手机端, 因为人在大屏才愿意填长表单。所以这类产品应在 device 报告里给 computer 加正向 bid adjustment、手机端反而降; 反过来低客单价 / 简单结账产品手机端转化好。原理: 不同设备的用户场景和动机不一样, 一刀切定价是浪费。Amazon 启示: SD 的 device 设置可以用同样思路, 高客单价 ASIN 加权 desktop, 冲动消费类 ASIN 加权 mobile。
quote_en: if you're selling a higher priced item or you're requiring a contact form which has more details on it then you may find that you'd actually want to put a positive bid adjustment on computers... whereas if your products are very low priced or you're really only just trying to drive someone to make a phone call you might find that mobiles work for you better

title_zh: 小预算策略: 地理范围收窄到 1-4 个区域, 避免铺得太广
summary_zh: Aaron 反复强调, 小预算 (如每天 $20-30) 最大的错误就是把投放范围设成整个城市。建议只锁定 1-4 个最赚钱的郊区/邮编。同理迁移到 Amazon SP/SD: 低预算时不要勾选 'auto-targeting + 全美', 应集中预算在 1-3 个最匹配的关键词组 (exact / phrase) 或一个高 ROAS 的 ASIN-target, 让有限的展示量都花在最相关的位置上, 而不是被算法稀释到泛流量里。
quote_en: if you've got a small budget the worst thing you can do is target the entire city pick one to four suburbs and own them

title_zh: 选搜索量更低、CPC 更便宜的关键词主题, 避开烧钱大词
summary_zh: 案例: 水管工小预算客户不要碰 'emergency plumbing' (CPC $15-20, 预算秒烧光), 而是去做 'drainage installation' / 'gas fitting' 这类长尾低 CPC 词, 单价低、转化意图明确、竞争小。Amazon 类比: 新品 / 小预算不要去打 BSR Top 10 大词 (CPC $3+), 而是先打 long-tail exact 关键词或竞品 ASIN-target (CPC $0.5-1), 同样预算能拿到 5-10 倍展示量, 并积累更干净的转化数据喂给 A9。
quote_en: don't go after the high volume keyword themes find the lower volume cheaper ones where you can actually win

title_zh: Location 选 'Presence' 而非 'Interest', 避免预算外溢
summary_zh: Google Ads 默认地理定位是 'Presence or Interest', 即使用户不在你的目标区域, 只要他搜索过相关地点也会触发广告——对小预算是灾难。必须切到 'Presence only', 只投真正在目标区域的人。Amazon 同构问题: Sponsored Display 的 audience targeting 默认会扩展到相似受众, 小预算应关掉 expanded targeting, 确保钱花在精确受众/关键词上。
quote_en: switch from presence or interest to presence only otherwise you're paying for tire-kickers who just searched the area

title_zh: Ad Rank = Max CPC × Quality Score: CTR 高的低出价者反而排名更前
summary_zh: Aaron 用具体数字打脸 'bid 越高越好' 的迷思: 竞争对手出价 $5、CTR 3%、QS 5/10 → Ad Rank 15; 你出价 $2、CTR 12%、QS 9/10 → Ad Rank 18, 你赢且 CPC 更低。Amazon SP 的 Impression Share 逻辑高度类似: A9 优先给 CVR/CTR 高的广告位, 提升 listing 主图 CTR + ASIN CVR 比单纯加 bid 更有效降低 ACOS。
quote_en: you can pay two dollars and beat the guy paying five if your click-through rate and quality score are higher ad rank wins not raw bid

title_zh: Quality Score 至少 8/10: 关键词必须同时出现在标题、描述、落地页
summary_zh: QS 低于 7 就放弃这个关键词。提升 QS 三要素: (1) 关键词写进 RSA headline 至少 1-2 条; (2) 关键词写进 description; (3) 落地页 H1 + 首屏 copy 含该关键词。Amazon 类比: listing relevance score 同样靠关键词在 title / bullets / A+ / backend 多处一致出现, 不要为了 SEO 堆砌无关词, A9 会扣关联度分。
quote_en: aim for eight to ten on quality score the keyword needs to be in your headline in your description and on your landing page all three

title_zh: 前 30-60 天用 broad match 收数据, 再每 3-4 天 audit search terms 升级到 phrase/exact
summary_zh: 新账号或新词组前 30-60 天先用 broad (纯 broad, 不是 broad modifier) 让 Google 喂搜索词数据, 每 3-4 天去 Search Terms Report, 高 CVR 的词加进 phrase/exact campaign 加价, 烂词加 negative。Amazon SP 完全可复刻: 自动广告 14-30 天收 search term → 高转化词搬到手动 exact 加价、烂词加 exact negative, 形成 auto → manual exact 双层漏斗。
quote_en: run broad for the first thirty to sixty days then every three to four days audit your search terms promote the winners to phrase or exact kill the rest with negatives

title_zh: 每个 ad group 至少 3 条 RSA: 1 条不 pin + 2 条战略性 pin, 小账号别等 Google 自动测试
summary_zh: ETA 在 2022/06/30 退场后, Aaron 强制每个 ad group 上 3 条 RSA: 第 1 条 headline 全开放让 Google 自由组合; 第 2-3 条把品牌词 / 主关键词 pin 到 H1+H2 锁定结构。原因是 Google 'Optimize' 的自动测试要每月 ~5000 impression 才能产出胜出 ad, 小账号根本跑不到, 只能靠人工多版本同时上去抢曝光。Amazon SB 类比: 一个 SB campaign 上 3-4 条 creative variant (不同 headline / lifestyle 主图), 别等 Amazon 自动选优, 主动跑 14 天看 CTR 自己淘汰。
quote_en: you need at least three rsas per ad group one with no pinned headlines and two with your brand and main keyword pinned because small accounts never hit the five thousand impressions google needs to finish testing

title_zh: Phrase / Exact match 现在匹配 '含义' 不是 '词': 必须每周 audit search terms 否则烧钱
summary_zh: Google 把 phrase / exact 的匹配逻辑从 '含同样词' 改成 '含同样含义'。例子: 你出 'fluffy earmuffs' phrase, 现在会被 'soft ear warmers' / 'plush headbands' 触发; 出 'lawn care' exact 会触发 'grass maintenance'。后果: 即使你用 exact 也会跑出大量无关词, 必须每周拉 search term report 加 negative。Amazon SP 没有 'meaning match' 这层风险 (exact 还是 exact), 但自动广告的 'close match' / 'loose match' 行为类似 Google broad, 同样要每周 audit。
quote_en: phrase and exact now match the meaning not just the words your fluffy earmuffs exact will trigger soft ear warmers if you don't pull negatives weekly google will eat your budget

title_zh: Pinning 策略: H1 = 品牌词, H2 = 主关键词, 其他 headline 让 Google 自由组合
summary_zh: Aaron 的 RSA pin 公式: position 1 固定 1-2 条品牌 headline (建立信任 + 防竞品蹭); position 2 固定 2-3 条核心关键词 headline (保证相关性 / QS); position 3 完全开放给 Google 测 USP / promo / CTA。这样既锁定 ad rank 计算需要的关键词信号, 又留出空间让 AI 优化。Amazon SB headline copy 同样可以 '品牌名 + 核心词 + 利益点' 三段式锁定, 但 Amazon 不允许 dynamic insertion, 所以建议直接做 3-5 条静态 SB 跑 A/B。
quote_en: pin your brand to position one your main keyword to position two and leave position three completely open that's how you control structure and still let google optimize

title_zh: 5 大优化板块的不同节奏: search term 72h / ad weekly+monthly / QS monthly / bid+audience 90 天
summary_zh: Aaron 的核心反直觉观点: 不同优化项要按 Google AI 学习速度匹配节奏, 频繁改 bid 反而拖累机器学习。完整 cadence: (1) Search terms 每 72 小时 (烧钱最快); (2) Ad copy review 每周 + 月度深度; (3) Quality Score 每月扫一次低分词; (4) Bid / audience / demographics 每 90 天才能动 (AI 需要时间 relearn); (5) Conversion / location / goal 每季度复核。Amazon 同理: SP bid 频繁改会重置 placement 学习, 建议 7 天观察 + 14 天微调; ASIN 主图 / A+ 改完后给 28 天 attribution window。
quote_en: search terms every seventy-two hours ads weekly quality score monthly but bids and audiences only every ninety days because google's ai needs time to learn

title_zh: Search term audit 在 ad group 级别用 7 天窗口看 ~100 行, keyword audit 用 30 天窗口找 outlier
summary_zh: 粒度选择决定信噪比: search term 必须在 ad group 级别拉 (campaign 级别会混入不同主题词), 用 7 天窗口扫 ~100 行(高 cost / 0 conv 的直接 negative); 而 keyword 自身的表现要拉 30 天 (样本太小 CPA 会失真), 重点看高 CPC 或高 cost-per-conversion 的 outlier 决定降价或暂停。Amazon SP search term report 同样建议: auto / broad campaign 用 7 天扫无关 ASIN/ 词加 negative, 关键词 ACoS 表现用 30 天加 placement modifier。
quote_en: pull search terms at the ad group level over seven days about a hundred rows but for keywords use thirty days you need a bigger sample for cpa to be reliable

title_zh: 纪律性 cadence 实战: 6 个月 23 → 135 conv/月 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 → $1.75
summary_zh: Aaron 展示的真实账号: 没有改预算, 没有上新 campaign, 只是按 cadence 表执行 6 个月 — search term audit 每 72h, ad copy 每周, 大改动每 90 天 — 月转化 23 → 135 (4.5x), CPC 从 $4.20 降到 $1.75 (-58%)。结论: 大多数账号不是缺新策略, 是缺纪律和正确节奏。Amazon 同样: 大量卖家每天手动改 bid / 关广告, 反而打乱 placement 学习; 改成固定每周一次的 audit cadence + 90 天战略性调整 ACoS / TACoS 通常能跑赢 '勤奋型' 操盘。
quote_en: no new campaigns no new budget just disciplined cadence took this account from twenty-three to one hundred thirty-five conversions and dropped cpc from four twenty to one seventy-five in six months

title_zh: Ad group 必须按 keyword theme 切分: 'men's shoes' / 'women's shoes' / 'kids shoes' 各自独立 copy
summary_zh: Aaron 把一个 'shoes' campaign 拆成 3 个 ad group, 每个 ad group 只放一个主题的关键词 + 该主题的 headline / description。原因: RSA 的 Quality Score 来自关键词与 ad copy 的相关性, 把男鞋 / 女鞋 / 童鞋混进同一个 ad group, copy 必然泛化, QS 全线下滑。Amazon SP 完全适用: 不要把 'yoga mat'+'foam roller'+'resistance band' 放进同一手动 campaign, 应按 product variation / use case 拆 ad group, 每组 keyword 独立, 这样自动出价 / placement 学习更精准, ASIN 关联度也更高。
quote_en: you don't want everything crammed into one campaign or one ad group structure them into different keyword themes so the ad copy actually matches what the searcher typed

title_zh: 新 campaign 头 30-60 天先用 'Maximize Clicks', 拿到转化数据后才切 'Maximize Conversions'
summary_zh: Aaron 反对新账号一开始就用 conversion-based bidding (Maximize Conversions / tCPA / tROAS): Google 算法需要历史转化样本才能学习, 没数据就上 conversion bidding 会导致曝光骤降 + 成本失控。正确路径: 头 30-60 天用 Manual CPC 或 Maximize Clicks 收集 50+ 转化样本, 再切 Maximize Conversions。Amazon SP 同理: 新 ASIN / 新 campaign 头 14-30 天用 Dynamic bid down only 或 Fixed bid 收集转化数据, 等 ACoS 稳定后再切 'Dynamic bid up and down' 让算法激进出价, 否则 Amazon 算法会把预算烧在 placement 学习上。
quote_en: don't start with maximize conversions you need at least thirty to sixty days of data first start with clicks then switch when google has enough conversions to learn from

title_zh: Audience segments 设为 'Observation' 不是 'Targeting': 先观察哪个受众转化好再加价
summary_zh: Aaron 强烈反对一开始就用 'Targeting' 模式锁死受众 (会大幅压缩流量), 推荐用 'Observation' 模式: 受众层只是观察标签, 不限制谁能看到广告, 跑 30-60 天后看哪个 in-market / affinity 受众 CVR 最高, 再对该层加 bid modifier (+20~+50%)。Amazon SP/SD 类比: 'Audiences' targeting 在 SD 里同样可以先用 broad reach + observation 视角看哪些 lifestyle / interest 受众转化好, 再单独 build 一个 high-bid SD audience campaign 加价收割, 不要一上来就锁死单一 audience segment。
quote_en: set audience segments to observation not targeting at the start you don't know yet who's converting let google show you then bid up the winners

title_zh: Search 广告必须关掉 Display Network + Search Partners, 否则数据被稀释
summary_zh: Google Ads 默认勾选 'Search Network partners' 和 'Display Network', 把你的 search budget 推到 AOL / 第三方搜索框 / 横幅展示位, CTR 和 CVR 完全不同, 但数据混在一起报告, 让你误判 search campaign 表现。Aaron 一律取消勾选, 只跑纯 Google search。Amazon 类比: SP campaign 跑搜索结果位 + 商品页位 (placement) 表现差异极大, 必须用 'Top of Search' / 'Product Pages' / 'Rest of Search' 的 placement modifier 单独看 ROAS, 不要看 campaign 总均值; 必要时把 product page placement 单独建 SD campaign 跑。
quote_en: always uncheck search partners and display network on a search campaign they dilute your data and the performance is completely different
